title: Senior Software Engineer, GTM Engineering
description:
At Vanta, our mission is to help businesses earn and prove trust. We believe that security should be monitored and verified continuously, and we empower companies to practice better security and prove it with ease. Vanta has a kind and talented team, and while some have prior security experience, many have been successful at Vanta without it.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer on Vanta's GTM Engineering team, you will design and ship internal tools that transform how our go\\-to\\-market teams operate. You'll embed with Sales, Customer Success, and Revenue Operations to build novel applications and platforms that accelerate pipeline generation, improve win rates, and scale how Vanta engages customers.
   

  

 Vanta's GTM Engineering team operates as an internal incubator: applying our technology at scale to revolutionize customer engagement. We build high\\-impact tools that reshape conversations, learn from every customer interaction, and demonstrate the value of our platform in real\\-world scenarios. This team sits at the intersection of product engineering and GTM strategy, shipping solutions that range from rapid prototypes to production\\-grade systems.
   

  

 As a senior engineer on this team, you will own end\\-to\\-end outcomes, move quickly from concept to production, and directly shape how customers experience Vanta in the field. This role is ideal for builders who want to be close to users, solve complex business problems with elegant technical solutions, and define entirely new categories of enterprise software.
   

  

*Visit our* 
*Vanta Engineering Blog* 
*to learn more about what our team is working on!*
**What you’ll do as a Software Engineer at Vanta:**
* Build and ship applications that accelerate Vanta's GTM efforts: from AI\\-powered workflows that automate prospecting and account research to internal tools that improve rep productivity and pipeline velocity
* Own the full product lifecycle: prototype, iterate, ship, and maintain solutions that solve real\\-world customer and internal workflow problems
* Partner closely with Sales, Technical Success, and Revenue Operations to identify high\\-leverage opportunities, understand user needs, and build for them
* Apply AI and modern technologies in novel ways to systematize and automate GTM workflows (e.g., pipeline generation, deal preparation, renewal velocity, scoring and routing)
* Design, develop, and maintain internal\\-facing web applications and AI\\-driven agents using a mix of frameworks, APIs, and code (Python, TypeScript, SQL)
* Ship reliable, maintainable systems with technical documentation, monitoring, and testing frameworks to ensure adoption and observability
* Translate learnings from customer\\-facing work into feedback for product and research teams to inform broader product development
* Evaluate and implement new technologies, orchestration tools, and AI platforms with a clear "build vs. buy" perspective


**How to be successful in this role:**
* 7\\+ years of software engineering experience with a strong focus on building and shipping full\\-stack applications
* Former founder or early engineer at a startup (0–50 employees): you've built products from the ground up, navigated ambiguity, and owned outcomes in a fast\\-paced, resource\\-constrained environment
* Deep technical skill set: proficiency in modern programming languages (Python, TypeScript/JavaScript), experience with web frameworks (React, Node.js), and strong SQL skills
* Understanding of how AI and automation can be applied to business workflows: experience with LLM APIs, prompt engineering, or workflow automation tools is a strong plus
* Experience working closely with non\\-technical stakeholders (Sales, Operations, Customer Success) to translate business needs into technical requirements and ship impactful solutions
* Product mindset: you care about user experience, business impact, and building systems that people love to use, not just technical elegance
* Demonstrated ability to move quickly from prototype to production, make effective tradeoffs, and ship incrementally
* Excellent communication skills and the ability to explain technical decisions to business stakeholders and executive leadership
* Experience with GTM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Gong, workflow automation tools like Workato or n8n) or modern data stack tools (Snowflake, dbt) is a plus
* Must be authorized to work in the U.S. without the need for current or future employer sponsorship
* Open to using AI to amplify their skills and strengthen their work \\- demonstrating curiosity, a willingness to learn, and sound judgment in applying AI responsibly to improve efficiency and impact


**What you can expect as a Vanta’n:**
* Industry\\-competitive salary and equity
* Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage, with 100% of employee\\-only benefit premiums covered for most medical plans
* 16 weeks Parental Leave for all new parents
* Health \\& wellness stipend
* Remote workspace, internet, and cellphone stipend
* Commuter benefits for team members who report to the SF and NYC office
* Family planning benefits
* Matching 401(k) contribution with immediate vesting
* Flexible PTO policy, plus 80 hours of Sick Time
* 11 company\\-paid holidays
* Virtual team building activities, lunch and learns, and other company\\-wide events!
* Offices in SF, NYC, London, Dublin, Tel Aviv, and Sydney


 To provide greater transparency to candidates, we share base pay ranges for all US\\-based job postings regardless of state. We set standard base pay ranges for all roles based on function, level, and country location, benchmarked against similar\\-stage growth companies. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors and may vary based on candidate location, skills, depth of work experience, and relevant licenses/credentials.
   

  

*At Vanta, we are committed to hiring diverse talent of different backgrounds and as such, it is important to us to provide an inclusive work environment for all. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender identity, age, religion, sexual orientation, veteran or disability status, or any other protected class. As an equal opportunity employer, we encourage and welcome people of all backgrounds to apply.*
**About Vanta**
 We started in 2018, in the wake of several high\\-profile data breaches. Online security was only becoming more important, but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast\\-growing companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling companies to improve and prove their security. From our early days automating security monitoring for compliance standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the world's leading Trust Management Platform, our vision remains unchanged.
   

  

 Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a point\\-in\\-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust— all in a way that's real\\-time and transparent.
   

  

**Referral Instructions**
 If you are being referred for the role, please contact that person to apply on your behalf.

title: Hybrid .Net/MS Dynamics Sr. Software Engineer

* Experience with Azure services such as Azure Functions, Logic Apps, App Services, Service Bus, or related cloud technologies preferred.
* Understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC), Agile Frameworks, DevOps concepts, source control, and CI/CD deployment practices.
* Experience integrating enterprise applications using APIs, middleware, and cloud\\-based integration patterns.
* Capability to work independently; a self\\-starter who performs initiatives that provide solutions for business requirements with a logical approach to problem resolution.
* Technical skills and experience to participate in the development and maintenance of business applications.
* Strong project management and leadership skills to guide efforts of junior programmers.
* Outstanding organizational, communication, and presentation skills.
* Adaptable to ongoing changes in technology.
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills with the ability to communicate technical concepts to both technical and non\\-technical stakeholders.



  





**Travel Requirements** 



* Domestic 20%
* Hybrid position



  





 115\\-127K

title: Senior Software Engineer - Linux Kernel/eBPF
description:
Cloud Network Monitoring (CNM) gives you visibility into your network traffic between services, containers, availability zones, and any other tag in Datadog. Our core responsibility is tracking network flows on the host using eBPF, ensuring deep visibility into network health and network signals across a wide variety of Linux distributions and kernel versions.
   

  

 Datadog is investing heavily in Network Monitoring to give customers comprehensive Layer 1 to Layer 7 visibility across their infrastructure. The Cloud Network Monitoring team builds the agent\\-side instrumentation that makes this possible, using eBPF programs that capture network activity at the kernel level at scale. One of our key challenges is handling a high volume of network data and kernel events while maintaining a minimal footprint on the customer's host. Balancing exhaustive observability with performance that is invisible to the workloads we monitor is critical to the adoption and success of our product.
   

  

 In this role, you will work at the intersection of eBPF, the Linux kernel, and network infrastructure. You'll contribute to Network Monitoring capabilities within the Datadog Agent, investigate production incidents, improve reliability, and help shape the architecture of one of the most widely deployed eBPF solutions in the industry.
   

  

 At Datadog, we place value in our office culture—the relationships and collaboration it builds and the creativity it brings to the table. We operate as a hybrid workplace to ensure our Datadogs can create a work\\-life harmony that best fits them.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Contribute to the end\\-to\\-end development of Network Monitoring features, from ideation to implementation within the Datadog Agent
* Build and maintain shared eBPF functionality for product teams to use in their eBPF\\-based products
* Investigate and debug complex production issues that span the kernel, eBPF programs, and agent runtime
* Research, prototype, develop, and document solutions to hard problems in the eBPF and network monitoring space
* Provide technical input to product and architecture decisions


 Who You Are
   

  

* Possess deep technical experience in Linux kernel development, whether through eBPF, core kernel contributions, or engineering low\\-level systems in C
* Demonstrate a robust understanding of fundamental network protocols, including TCP and UDP
* Have a proven track record of architecting and building high\\-throughput, low\\-latency infrastructure
* Bring 5\\+ years of experience engineering complex applications and tooling, with the ability to reason about systems in depth
* Prioritize solving customer\\-facing problems by building elegant, high\\-impact products that users love
* Thrive in fast\\-paced environments, taking full ownership of initiatives and driving them to resolution with minimal guidance
* Genuinely enjoy tackling hard technical problems and feel energized by navigating complex challenges across the full stack
* Collaborate effectively within a team\\-oriented environment to achieve shared goals


 Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your skills, we encourage you to apply.
   

  

 Benefits and Growth:
   

  

* New hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase plan (ESPP)
* Continuous professional development, product training, and career pathing
* Intra\\-departmental mentor and buddy program for in\\-house networking
* An inclusive company culture, ability to join our Community Guilds
* Access to Inclusion Talks, our Internal panel discussions
* Free, global Spring Health benefits for employees and dependents age 6\\+
* Competitive global benefits


 Benefits and Growth listed above may vary based on the country of your employment and the nature of your employment with Datadog.
   

  

 About Datadog:
   

  

 Datadog is the leading observability and security platform for the AI era, providing businesses with unified visibility across the technology stack to manage complexity at scale. It brings applications, infrastructure, data, models, and security into one place, using AI to detect and resolve issues before they impact customers. Trusted globally by Fortune 500 companies and high\\-growth AI leaders, Datadog enables businesses to move faster with clarity and confidence. title: Full-Stack Engineer (.NET)
description:
**Job Description**
 We are hiring (UOP only) a Full‑stack Product Engineer to join a small, cross‑functional Agile team within the Learn 365 product. The role focuses on delivering customer value through close collaboration with product management and engineering peers, combining strong technical execution with a product‑oriented mindset. Learn 365 is a SaaS learning management system designed for enterprise customers as part of the Human Success Platform. The product is built on a Microsoft‑oriented technology stack and is evolving to incorporate AI‑driven features to stay competitive in the market.
   

  

**Job Requirements**
 We are seeking a
 **Senior Full\\-Stack Engineer** 
 with strong experience in
 **.NET and TypeScript (3\\+ years)** 
 to join our AI team and help take our product capabilities to the next level.
   

  

**This Role Goes Beyond Traditional Development—it Involves**
* Driving the design and implementation of AI\\-powered features
* Collaborating closely with product managers and cross\\-functional stakeholders
* Continuously exploring and evaluating emerging AI technologies
* Rapid prototyping and efficiently bringing innovations into production
* Actively contributing to the evolution toward agentic engineering practices


 You’ll be joining a small, high\\-impact team (3 engineers total\\+1 QA), where ownership, initiative, and innovation are essential. This is one of several small teams that use a Scrum‑based Agile process with two‑week sprints and monthly releases
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, implement, and maintain features across both backend and frontend
* Actively participate in shaping product functionality by questioning, refining, and improving requirements
* Collaborate with the product manager to translate business needs into technical solutions
* Contribute ideas and prototypes, especially around emerging AI capabilities
* Maintain code quality while focusing on pragmatic delivery of value
* Communicate effectively within a small, fast‑moving team


**Required Skills And Experience**
* Strong product mindset: interest in why features are built, not just how
* Full‑stack readiness with experience in: .NET/C\\#/TypeScript/React
* Ability to move fluidly between backend and frontend without strict specialization
* Solid understanding of SaaS application development
* Good theoretical and practical engineering fundamentals


**AI and Innovation Expectations**
* Curiosity and hands‑on interest in AI technologies
* Willingness to experiment, prototype, and help define standards for AI features
* Proactive approach to applying new technical ideas in a production‑ready way


**Soft Skills And Mindset**
* Strong communication skills; ability to articulate ideas clearly
* Comfortable collaborating closely in a small team environment
* Product‑oriented thinking rather than task‑only execution
* Open to feedback and discussion; willing to challenge assumptions constructively
* Sense of ownership over results and delivered value


**Interview Process**
* Single interview round, typically around two hours
* Interview involves up to three interviewers (engineering leadership and team representatives)
* Structured in three parts: Behavioral discussion focused on past experience and problem handling; Short theoretical questions on relevant technologies; Live code reading and coding exercises via screen sharing


**Location and Work Model**
* Hiring focused in Poland (for example Warsaw and other major cities)
* Hybrid work model; on‑site presence encouraged but not strictly required
* Flexibility depending on individual circumstances and team needs


**Show me … the benefits!**
**Full Flexibility**
